summary.notes: OU AR(1) OLS calibration on 240 monthly log(A/E) observations (dt=0.0833); kappa from the regression slope phi=exp(-kappa dt), long-run level from intercept/(1-phi) (== sample mean to first order), sigma_b from the residual variance via the OU stationary relation. Behaviour is non-financial (P=Q drift); capital projection starts at b(0)=0.0000.

gate_glapse.gate_description: OU lapse behavioural-index parameters (kappa_b, long-run level, sigma_b) calibrated to lapse-experience A/E history (not placeholders); kappa in [0.05, 5.0], long-run level in [-0.20, 0.20], sigma in [0.02, 0.60], stationary std in [0.02, 0.50] (SOA ASOP 7 §3.3; ASOP 56 §3.4)
gate_glapse.evidence: HK_PAR: n=240, kappa=0.7854 (half-life 0.9yr), long_run_level=-0.0360 (A/E 0.965), sigma=0.1781, stationary_std=0.1421
